title: Identifier and display-name change surfaces semantic boundary caution
text:
diff --git a/src/semantic_guard/models.py b/src/semantic_guard/models.py
--- a/src/semantic_guard/models.py
+++ b/src/semantic_guard/models.py
@@
-class ProjectRecord:
-    id: str
-    title: str
+class ProjectRecord:
+    name: str
+    display_name: str
+    storage_path: str
intent: ProjectRecord の表示名と保存先を整理する。
rationale: Renaming identifiers and storage fields can mix identity, display label, and persistence semantics.
